# Issues ‚Äî Project Backlog

> Product backlog and roadmap are maintained as **GitHub Issues** in this repository.
> See the [Issues tab](https://github.com/zan-ia/zan-book/issues) for the current board.
>
> Use the pipeline prompts to create well-structured issues:
>
> - `/iniciar-feature` ‚Äî new features
> - `/iniciar-bugfix` ‚Äî bug fixes
> - `/iniciar-melhoria` ‚Äî improvements and refactoring
>
> See `.github/instructions/pipeline-workflow.instructions.md` for the complete Plan‚ÜíImplement‚ÜíReview workflow.
